subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God, esteemed mother! When thou didst enter the blessed Shrine and attain the presence of the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله والده محترمه چون ببقعه مبارکه وارد شد و بعتبه مقدسه مشرف گشت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Shrines and Holy places
